name: Steganography Extract Files with Steghide
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Steganography Extract Files with Steghide
SIGMA Description: Detects extraction of files with usage of steghide binary, the adversaries may use this technique to prevent the detection of hidden information.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%steghide%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%extract%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-sf%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.png%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Steganography Extract Files with Steghide on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%steghide%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%extract%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-sf%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a3%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.png%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Steganography Extract Files with Steghide
